paper.title_en: Thermodynamic Consistency of Logarithmic Entropy Corrections on the Schwarzschild Branch of $f(\mathbb{Q})$ Gravity and a Superradiance No-Go Result
paper.abstract_en: We present a concise and explicit analysis of logarithmically corrected black-hole thermodynamics and scalar scattering on the Schwarzschild branch of symmetric teleparallel gravity. Treating the metric and the flat, torsion-free affine connection as independent variables, we formulate the relevant nonmetricity geometry and field equations and show that the linear branch is dynamically equivalent to general relativity up to a boundary term. The vacuum solution is therefore the Schwarzschild spacetime. The leading entropy is derived from both the Noether-charge method and the classical first law, after which a logarithmic correction is introduced. When the geometry and ADM mass are kept fixed, the geometric Hawking temperature remains unchanged, whereas the temperature defined through the corrected first law is modified. The apparent divergence of the heat capacity occurs outside the regime in which the logarithmic expansion is reliable and therefore cannot be interpreted as a physical phase transition. We also derive the scalar radial equation, effective potential, conserved Wronskian, and reflection-transmission relation. For a neutral scalar field on a static neutral background, no superradiant amplification occurs, and the entropy correction produces no first-order change in the scattering amplitudes unless a genuine semiclassical backreaction or an explicit rotating or charged black-hole solution is provided.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文直接处理黑体热力学中熵的对数修正，在f(Q)引力框架下检验热力学一致性，并得出超辐射无结果。理论与方法清晰，适合黑体热力学方向读者。
decision.title_zh: $f(\mathbb{Q})$引力Schwarzschild分支上对数熵修正的热力学一致性和超辐射无结果
decision.abstract_zh: 我们提出了对对称遥平行引力Schwarzschild分支上对数修正的黑洞热力学和标量散射的简洁明确分析。将度量和平坦、无挠的仿射联络视为独立变量，我们表述了相关的非度规几何和场方程，并表明线性分支在动力学上等价于带有边界项的一般相对论。因此，真空解是Schwarzschild时空。领先熵来自Noether荷方法和经典第一定律，之后引入对数修正。当几何和ADM质量保持固定时，几何Hawking温度不变，而通过修正第一定律定义的温度则被修改。热容量的视发散出现在对数展开可靠的区域之外，因此不能解释为物理相变。我们还推导了标量径向方程、有效势、守恒Wronskian和反射-透射关系。对于静态中性背景上的中性标量场，不会发生超辐射放大，并且熵修正不会引起散射幅度的一阶变化，除非提供了真正的半经典反作用或显式的旋转或带电黑洞解。
